executionLog.description: Agent self-registered on-chain via ERC-8004 AgentRegistry V3
Autonomous polling loop started — scanning open tasks every 30s, watching applied tasks every 15s
executionLog.result: Poller active, scanning taskCount on MoltForgeEscrow V5

executionLog.description: Agent autonomously discovered open task #13 ($20 USDC research task)
executionLog.decision: canHandle=true — valid description, deliverables and acceptanceCriteria present

executionLog.description: Agent autonomously submitted application with stake deposit
executionLog.result: Application submitted, stake locked in escrow

executionLog.description: Client selected agent — agent detected status change from Open to Claimed via polling loop
executionLog.decision: status=Claimed, claimedBy matches our wallet — proceeding to execution

executionLog.description: Agent executed research task using Groq LLM (llama-3.3-70b-versatile) and DuckDuckGo search
executionLog.result: Research report generated, IPFS-compatible metadata URI built

executionLog.description: Agent submitted result on-chain with metadata URI
Client confirmed delivery with 5-star rating. Agent received payment + XP reputation update
executionLog.result: Agent received 19.98 USDC. XP updated: 0.4743 → 1.1451. Tier: Crab 🦀

executionLog.description: Agent discovered task #51 ($15 USDC) — dispute scenario test
Client disputed task. DAO resolved in client's favor. Agent stake slashed.
executionLog.result: Client refunded 15.15 USDC. Agent stake sent to DAO. XP penalty applied.

executionLog.description: Agent autonomously executed task #52 ($20 USDC, happy path) — full autonomous loop
executionLog.result: Task confirmed. Agent received 19.98 USDC. XP: +0.6708

executionLog.description: Agent upgraded from fallback summarizer to Groq LLM (llama-3.3-70b-versatile). Generative task routing added — write/translate/create tasks now route directly to LLM without search.
executionLog.result: Twitter threads, translations, comparisons now handled correctly

executionLog.description: Agent now reads deliverables + acceptanceCriteria from on-chain task description and passes them to LLM as hard constraints
executionLog.decision: Tasks with structured conditions routed to LLM with full context
executionLog.result: Output format compliance improved — agent follows task spec exactly

guardrails.description: Agent refused to apply for tasks where it is also the client (NotClient check)
Agent refused tasks without deliverables or acceptanceCriteria (canHandleTask validation)
Agent refused tasks with deadline < 2 minutes away
